decisions.description: Determines if the running user is logged in through the Experience Cloud portal.
decisions.name: Check_if_Portal
decisions.label: Check if Portal

Flow.description: Screen flow that guides users to quickly and accurately generate, select, and/or send the correct documents required for Health Care Professionals (HCPs).
Flow.label: Generate Document

screens.description: This screen launches the LWC component responsible for document generation.
screens.name: Conga_Document_Generator_Screen
screens.label: Conga Document Generator Screen

fields.name: DownloadRadioBtnLWC
fields.fieldText: Would you like to generate another?

fields.name: eSignRadioBtns
fields.fieldText: Would you like to send another?

screens.description: Automates the selection, generation, and/or sending of the appropriate document template using input data and existing Salesforce records.
screens.name: Generate_Document_Screen
screens.label: Generate Document Screen

fields.name: NoDoc
fields.fieldText: No documents are available for this training. Please contact your admin for assistance.

fields.name: DisplaySelectedTemplate
fields.fieldText: Selected Document : "{!Select_Document_Type_and_Delivery_Method}"

fields.name: DisplaySelectedTemplateDownload
fields.fieldText: Selected Document : "{!Select_Document_Type_and_Delivery_Method}"

variables.description: Stores the Partner Server URL returned from the Salesforce API for the current user’s session, used for constructing Conga Composer URLs.
variables.name: partnerServerURL
